title: PriVault
body:
# PriVault A powerful multi-vault storage solution for Minecraft servers that gives players secure, permission-based access to multiple private storage spaces. ## Features ### Multiple Personal Vaults Players can access different numbered vaults with a simple command: `/pv [number]`. Each vault functions as a separate inventory space, allowing organization of different item categories. ### Permission-Based Access Server administrators have complete control over which players can access specific vaults. By default, all players receive access to vault #1, while additional vaults require specific permissions. ### Customizable Storage Capacity Adjust the size of each vault through the configuration file. Set vaults to any multiple of 9 slots, from a single row (9 slots) up to a full double chest (54 slots). ### Persistent Storage All vault contents are automatically saved when players close their inventories and when the server shuts down, ensuring no items are ever lost. ### User-Friendly Interface Clean, intuitive interface with customizable titles that can include player names and vault numbers for easy identification. ### Efficient Design Lightweight implementation with minimal server resource usage, even when handling multiple vaults for hundreds of players. ### Complete Configuration Every aspect of the plugin can be tailored to fit your server's needs through the comprehensive config.yml file. ### Sound Effects Optional sound effects when opening and closing vaults enhance the player experience. ## Why Choose This Plugin? This solution stands out from other storage plugins by providing a perfect balance between simplicity and functionality. Players gain access to multiple organized storage spaces without overwhelming complexity, while administrators maintain full control through the permission system. The plugin's efficient storage approach means minimal impact on server performance even with many active players. The clean code architecture also ensures compatibility with most server versions and other plugins. For servers with economy plugins, this creates natural progression paths where players can unlock additional vaults through in-game currency or rank advancements. ## Use Cases - **Survival Servers**: Provide extra storage options as rewards for player advancement - **RPG Servers**: Allow different vaults for different types of items (weapons, potions, valuables) - **Economy Servers**: Sell additional vault access as a premium feature - **Creative Servers**: Give builders separate storage spaces for different building materials ## Admin Commands - `/pv reload` - Reload the configuration file - `/pv admin [player] [number]` - View another player's vault (requires admin permission) With its perfect balance of simplicity for users and control for administrators, this plugin is the ideal storage solution for servers that value both functionality and performance.
